entries.source: Important events, facts learned, and uncertainty notes stay visible.
entries.value: Belangrike gebeure, feite wat geleer is, en onsekerheidsnotas bly sigbaar.

entries.source: In 4 sentences, explain how one assumption change moves revenue, cash flow, and value. Name one thing you would check before trusting it.
entries.value: Verduidelik in 4 sinne hoe 'n verandering in aanname inkomste, kontantvloei en waarde beweeg. Noem een ding wat jy sou nagaan voordat jy dit vertrou.

entries.source: Increase the challenge. Have the historical person defend their worldview more forcefully while the historian tracks weak claims.
entries.value: Verhoog die uitdaging. Laat die historiese persoon hul wêreldbeskouing kragtiger verdedig terwyl die historikus swak eise dophou.

entries.source: Individual crowd interactions are plausible composites
Individual routes through smoke are plausible, not exact
entries.value: Individuele roetes deur rook is aanneemlik, nie presies nie

entries.source: Interpret the target internally and begin immediately with a real diagnostic question.
entries.value: Interpreteer die teiken intern en begin onmiddellik met 'n werklike diagnostiese vraag.

entries.source: Invite a figure into the room.
It definitely rises because sales are higher.
entries.value: Dit styg beslis omdat verkope hoër is.

entries.source: It helps you explain profit potential, not just market size.
entries.value: Dit help jou om winspotensiaal te verduidelik, nie net markgrootte nie.

entries.source: It helps you predict policy, taxes, shortages, and market reactions without memorizing diagrams.
entries.value: Dit help jou om beleid, belasting, tekorte en markreaksies te voorspel sonder om diagramme te memoriseer.

entries.source: It is impossible to know anything until terminal value is calculated.
entries.value: Dit is onmoontlik om enigiets te weet totdat die terminale waarde bereken is.

entries.source: It lets you revise for logic, not just polish wording.
entries.value: Dit laat jou toe om vir logika te hersien, nie net om bewoording te poets nie.

entries.source: It makes you faster because each test either proves or removes a hypothesis.
entries.value: Dit maak jou vinniger omdat elke toets óf 'n hipotese bewys óf verwyder.

entries.source: It may fall because costs and working capital can absorb the sales gain.
entries.value: Dit kan daal omdat koste en bedryfskapitaal die verkoopsgroei kan absorbeer.

entries.source: Jumps to valuation before reading the operating model.
entries.value: Spring na waardasie voordat die bedryfsmodel gelees word.

entries.source: Keep governance, money, labor, technology, and culture in view.
entries.value: Hou bestuur, geld, arbeid, tegnologie en kultuur in gedagte.

entries.source: Keep the sidecar quieter unless something needs correction.
entries.value: Hou die syspan stiller tensy iets regstelling vereis.

entries.source: Kingdom of England under Charles II
entries.value: Koninkryk van Engeland onder Charles II

entries.source: Kingdom of France in revolutionary crisis
entries.value: Koninkryk van Frankryk in revolusionêre krisis
Taal en kleredrag dui op risiko
Retrospektief laat in die lewe voor dood

entries.source: Learn how they thought, worked, planned, wrote, governed, or experimented.
entries.value: Leer hoe hulle gedink, gewerk, beplan, geskryf, regeer of geëksperimenteer het.

entries.source: Learn supply and demand by working through examples
entries.value: Leer vraag en aanbod deur voorbeelde deur te werk
Regstatus het die daaglikse lewe gevorm

entries.source: List what has to be true for the idea to work.
entries.value: Lys wat waar moet wees vir die idee om te werk.

entries.source: Listing the five labels without judging their strength does not explain whether the industry is attractive.
entries.value: Om die vyf etikette te lys sonder om hul sterkte te beoordeel, verduidelik nie of die bedryf aantreklik is nie.

entries.source: Literate helper near records, letters, or multilingual exchange
entries.value: Geletterde helper naby rekords, briewe of meertalige uitruiling

entries.source: Livres, sous, bread prices as daily pressure
entries.value: Livres, sous, broodpryse as daaglikse druk

entries.source: Local working language with class-appropriate fluency
Lock useful notes only after the idea has been used.
entries.value: Sluit nuttige notas eers nadat die idee gebruik is.

entries.source: Look for the causal link. Which variable actually changed, and what does it affect next?
entries.value: Soek vir die oorsaaklike skakel. Watter veranderlike het werklik verander, en wat beïnvloed dit volgende?

entries.source: Make the first rough structure before giving advice. Start with: "I made the first rough structure. Edit anything. I will react to your changes."
entries.value: Maak die eerste rowwe struktuur voordat jy advies gee. Begin met: "Ek het die eerste rowwe struktuur gemaak. Wysig enigiets. Ek sal op jou veranderinge reageer."

entries.source: Manipulation proves you can use the model, not just repeat it.
entries.value: Manipulasie bewys dat jy die model kan gebruik, nie net herhaal nie.

entries.source: Map allies, enemies, critics, patrons, and pressure groups around this person at this moment.
entries.value: Kaarteer bondgenote, vyande, kritici, beskermhere en drukgroepe rondom hierdie persoon op hierdie oomblik.

entries.source: Market street near Chandni Chowk during the siege
entries.value: Markstraat naby Chandni Chowk tydens die beleg

entries.source: market, household, workshop, port, school, or neighborhood
entries.value: mark, huishouding, werkswinkel, hawe, skool, of buurt

entries.source: Markets move when incentives change. Demand captures willingness to buy, supply captures willingness to sell, and price is where the pressure balances.
entries.value: Markte beweeg wanneer aansporings verander. Vraag verteenwoordig die bereidwilligheid om te koop, aanbod verteenwoordig die bereidwilligheid om te verkoop, en prys is waar die druk balanseer.

entries.source: Markets, homes, workshops, courts, maps, and decision points.
entries.value: Markte, huise, werkswinkels, howe, kaarte, en besluitnemingspunte.

entries.source: Merge the accepted changes into a clean current version, then update the decision log and open questions.
entries.value: Voeg die aanvaarde veranderinge saam in 'n skoon huidige weergawe, werk dan die besluitelogboek en oop vrae by.
Michelangelo se Dawid is in 1504 geïnstalleer

entries.source: Misses become a smaller review deck
Missing the curfew or ignoring official rank can quickly become dangerous.
entries.value: Om die aandklokreël te mis of amptelike rang te ignoreer kan vinnig gevaarlik word.

entries.source: Modern assumptions about equal citizenship would be immediately out of place.
entries.value: Moderne aannames oor gelyke burgerskap sou onmiddellik uit plek wees.

entries.source: Modern talk of individual artistic genius can sound naive without patronage, guild, and civic context.
entries.value: Moderne praatjies oor individuele artistieke genie kan naïef klink sonder beskermheerskap, gildes en burgerlike konteks.

entries.source: More immersive, with tighter limits on what you can know and say.
entries.value: Meer meesleurend, met strenger perke op wat jy kan weet en sê.

entries.source: Move carefully and notice ordinary life before judging.
entries.value: Beweeg versigtig en let op die alledaagse lewe voordat jy oordeel.

entries.source: Move one control, watch the result, then explain why the output changed.
entries.value: Skuif een kontrole, kyk na die resultaat, en verduidelik dan waarom die uitset verander het.

entries.source: Moving every control at once makes it hard to know what caused the result.
entries.value: Om elke kontrole gelyktydig te skuif maak dit moeilik om te weet wat die resultaat veroorsaak het.

entries.source: Moving on after recognition instead of testing recall and transfer.
entries.value: Gaan aan na herkenning in plaas daarvan om herroeping en oordrag te toets.

entries.source: Mughal symbolic authority under rebel control, contested by the East India Company
entries.value: Mogol-simboliese gesag onder rebellebeheer, betwis deur die Oos-Indiese Kompanjie

entries.source: Multiple explanations can help, but the proof is what you can do after reading.
entries.value: Veelvuldige verduidelikings kan help, maar die bewys is wat jy kan doen nadat jy gelees het.

entries.source: Name the input you changed, the immediate effect, and the final result.
entries.value: Noem die inset wat jy verander het, die onmiddellike effek, en die finale resultaat.

entries.source: Name the topic and your current guess. The app builds a ladder of questions, hints, evidence, and synthesis.
entries.value: Noem die onderwerp en jou huidige raaiskoot. Die toepassing bou 'n leer van vrae, wenke, bewyse en sintese.

entries.source: Napoleon after Austerlitz, Ambedkar in the Constitution committee...
entries.value: Napoleon na Austerlitz, Ambedkar in die Grondwetkomitee...

entries.source: Near Akbar's imperial complex and debate spaces
entries.value: Naby Akbar se keiserlike kompleks en debatruimtes
Nog geen duidelike gaping gemerk nie.

entries.source: No full answer unless you ask.
entries.value: Geen volledige antwoord tensy jy vra nie.
Geen groot wanopvatting het voortgeduur nie.

entries.source: Nothing changes unless buyers' tastes change.
entries.value: Niks verander tensy kopers se smaak verander nie.

entries.source: Olive oil, dust, bronze, public argument, and the uneasy pride of a wounded democracy.
entries.value: Olyfolie, stof, brons, openbare argumente, en die ongemaklike trots van 'n gewonde demokrasie.

entries.source: One short concept chunk at a time, with examples that fit your level.
entries.value: Een kort konsepstuk op 'n slag, met voorbeelde wat by jou vlak pas.

entries.source: One targeted question tests the current understanding.
entries.value: Een doelgerigte vraag toets die huidige begrip.

entries.source: One tight arrival, three discoveries, and a debrief stamp.
entries.value: Een vinnige aankoms, drie ontdekkings, en 'n debrief-stempel.

entries.source: Open the evidence drawer. Label high-confidence facts, plausible reconstructions, contested claims, and things you must not fabricate.
entries.value: Maak die bewyse-laai oop. Merk feite met hoë vertroue, aanneemlike rekonstruksies, betwiste eise, en dinge wat jy nie mag versin nie.

entries.source: Open the Historical Person mini app as a staged historical audience with a living dossier.
entries.value: Maak die Historiese Persoon-minitoepassing oop as 'n opgevoerde historiese gehoor met 'n lewende dossier.

entries.source: Openings that produce a better encounter.
entries.value: Openings wat 'n beter ontmoeting tot gevolg het.

entries.source: Optional: paste notes, syllabus points, or facts to prioritize
entries.value: Opsioneel: plak notas, sillabuspunte, of feite om te prioritiseer

entries.source: Ordinary reactions are plausible blends of legal and literary evidence
entries.value: Gewone reaksies is aanneemlike mengsels van wetlike en literêre bewyse
Ostia het Rome se voorsieningstelsel bedien

entries.source: Out-of-time observer with a discreet field guide
Paste an article, case, or passage
Pick any topic. I will build 10 multiple-choice questions and score you as you go.
entries.value: Kies enige onderwerp. Ek sal 10 meerkeusevrae opstel en jou punte gee soos jy vorder.

entries.source: Piety is civic, not private only
entries.value: Vroomheid is burgerlik, nie net privaat nie

entries.source: Plain respectable dress with writing tools
Plausible ordinary life should be labelled as reconstruction
entries.value: Aannemelike alledaagse lewe moet as rekonstruksie gemerk word

entries.source: Point attention to the relevant part.
entries.value: Vestig aandag op die relevante deel.

entries.source: Political language can mobilize or endanger
entries.value: Politieke taal kan mobiliseer of in gevaar stel

entries.source: Possible gap: short run vs long run
Precise sensory mix at a given stall
entries.value: Presiese sensoriese mengsel by 'n gegewe stalletjie

entries.source: Preferred setting: choose a historically fitting room, court, battlefield tent, study, prison, salon, workshop, public square, or other concrete place.
entries.value: Voorkeurinstelling: kies 'n histories gepaste kamer, hof, slagveldtent, studeerkamer, tronk, salon, werkswinkel, openbare plein of ander konkrete plek.

entries.source: Prepare for a class discussion on Tata's acquisition of JLR
entries.value: Berei voor vir 'n klasbespreking oor Tata se verkryging van JLR

entries.source: Printer's ink, sweat, bread queues, ironwork, and a city discovering its own force.
entries.value: Drukkersink, sweet, broodtoue, ysterwerk, en 'n stad wat sy eie krag ontdek.

entries.source: Pudding Lane as fire begins to spread
entries.value: Pudding Lane terwyl die vuur begin versprei

entries.source: Pudding Lane is associated with the outbreak
entries.value: Pudding Lane word met die uitbraak verbind

entries.source: Question prompts that deepen the exchange without turning it into a lecture.
entries.value: Vraagprompte wat die uitruiling verdiep sonder om dit in 'n lesing te verander.
